lore.value: Most summoners have a close connection to creatures from the farthest reaches of the planes. A few have a primal connection to nature, and their power is tied to primal magic. It is not unusual for these summoners to associate with druids, for like druids, first worlders have a powerful tie to the natural world. Some first worlders are driven half-mad by the strange energies and intelligences that seep into their minds and bodies, though, and these poor souls are prone to lash out at loggers, druids, or innocent passersby without considering whether or not they are threats. A first worlder芒聙聶s eidolon usually resembles a fey creature or a plant monster, though some are fantastic otherworldly animals with exaggerated features. A first worlder has the following class features. Summon Nature芒聙聶s Ally (Sp) Starting at 1st level, a first worlder can cast summon nature芒聙聶s ally a number of times per day equal to 3 + his Charisma modifier. At levels where a summoner would gain a more powerful summon monster spell as a spell-like ability, he instead gains the equivalent summon nature芒聙聶s ally spell (at 19th level, he can use summon nature芒聙聶s ally IX or gate ). When a first worlder gains a summon nature芒聙聶s ally spell as a spell-like ability, he adds it to his class spell list (he must still select it as a spell known if he wants to cast it as an actual spell). This ability otherwise replaces the summon monster ability of a normal summoner. Fey Summons (Su) At 3rd level, a first worlder adds the following creatures to the lists of what he can summon with his summon nature芒聙聶s ally spell-like ability: Summon nature芒聙聶s ally II: gremlin ( jinkin, pugwampi, or vexgit ). Summon nature芒聙聶s ally III: gremlin ( nuglub ). Summon nature芒聙聶s ally IV: unicorn. Summon nature芒聙聶s ally V: pixie, satyr. Summon nature芒聙聶s ally VII: nymph. Eidolon Instead of an outsider, a first worlder芒聙聶s eidolon has the fey creature type and the extraplanar subtype. Its statistics are changed from a standard eidolon as follows: Hit Dice d6 Hit Die (instead of d10). BAB Equal to 1/2 the eidolon芒聙聶s Hit Dice. Good/Bad Saves The eidolon芒聙聶s good saves area always Reflex and Will. Skills The eidolon芒聙聶s class skills are Acrobatics, Bluff, Climb, Craft, Diplomacy, Disguise, Escape Artist, Fly, Knowledge (geography), Knowledge (nature), Perception, Perform, Sense Motive, Sleight of Hand, Stealth, Swim, and Use Magic Device. Senses The eidolon gains low-light vision instead of darkvision. The summoner can grant the eidolon darkvision 60 ft. as a 1-point evolution. Damage Reduction If the first worlder chooses this evolution, he may select DR/cold iron instead of one of the alignment -based types of damage reduction. This otherwise works like and replaces the eidolon ability of a normal summoner.
